positive: A whimsical, adorable illustration of a fox wearing a tiny monocle, reading a book in a cozy armchair surrounded by floating dandelion seeds. Style: Children's book illustration, watercolor and ink wash, warm autumn palette, highly detailed fur texture, Pixar quality.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, scary, grunge
